purpose: Shared collection skeleton and stable attachment contract for future game animation.
deformation_strategy: Rigid modular bone parenting in generator v1; authored production meshes will add normalized skin weights without renaming bones.

attachment_points.equipment: Large discipline prop beside or beneath the athlete
attachment_points.equipment_grip.L: Left-hand board, pole, or handlebar contact
attachment_points.equipment_grip.R: Right-hand board, pole, or handlebar contact
attachment_points.tail: Animal tail base; unused for humans
